query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM follow_ups f
   INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
   WHERE f.corretorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%andrew%' LIMIT 1)
     AND f.status = 'ativo'
     AND l.status = 'em_atendimento'
     AND f.proximaTentativa <= CURDATE()) as total_hoje,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM follow_ups f
   INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
   WHERE f.corretorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%andrew%' LIMIT 1)
     AND f.status = 'ativo'
     AND l.status = 'em_atendimento'
     AND f.proximaTentativa <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) as total_ate_amanha;
